evals.prompt: Fix this Warp worktree config for WSL. It has A:\Users\anon\Desktop\deving\private-repos\codex-skills in directory and commands fields.
evals.expected_output: Converts the Warp worktree config to /mnt/a/Users/anon/Desktop/deving/private-repos/codex-skills paths, preserves placeholders, and explains whether raw-text TOML handling was needed.
assertions: Converts Windows-style drive-letter paths to /mnt/<drive>/ paths.
Touches the Warp directory and commands fields without rewriting unrelated values.
Mentions whether the config could be parsed normally or needed raw-text fallback.
Ends with a short summary of what changed.
expectations: Converts Windows-style drive-letter paths to /mnt/<drive>/ paths.
Touches the Warp directory and commands fields without rewriting unrelated values.
Mentions whether the config could be parsed normally or needed raw-text fallback.
Ends with a short summary of what changed.

evals.prompt: Warp generated a worktree TOML file with single-quoted Windows paths that fail to parse. Repair it safely for WSL.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes the TOML parsing edge case, falls back to raw-text handling, converts the paths, and validates the result.
assertions: Recognizes the Warp single-quoted TOML parsing edge case.
Falls back to raw-text handling when TOML parsing fails.
Converts only path-like values and leaves non-path strings alone.
Validates that no Windows drive-letter paths remain.
Reports any remaining ambiguity instead of guessing.
expectations: Recognizes the Warp single-quoted TOML parsing edge case.
Falls back to raw-text handling when TOML parsing fails.
Converts only path-like values and leaves non-path strings alone.
Validates that no Windows drive-letter paths remain.
Reports any remaining ambiguity instead of guessing.

evals.prompt: The Warp worktree config has bad commands and a broken directory path. Fix both and keep the autogenerated branch placeholder intact.
evals.expected_output: Repairs both directory and commands values, keeps the placeholder unchanged, and produces a concise summary.
assertions: Repairs both directory and commands values.
Keeps the autogenerated branch placeholder unchanged.
Does not modify name, id, or type fields unless they are literal paths.
Uses WSL path style consistently in absolute paths.
Produces a concise summary of the repair.
